department_name: Department of Civil Engineering and Geomatics
hub_subtitle: Central access point for the CUT geotechnical software suite.
contact_text:
Associate Professor Lysandros Pantelidis
Department of Civil Engineering and Geomatics
Cyprus University of Technology
lysandros.pantelidis@cut.ac.cy

web_applications.title: CUT Bearing Capacity
web_applications.description: Bearing-capacity tool for shallow foundations, including soil compressibility, groundwater conditions, seismic loading, reinforcement effects, and one-layer / two-layer soil cases.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: CUT K Coulomb
web_applications.description: Coulomb earth-pressure tool for smooth vertical walls, developed primarily as a supporting program for CUT Bearing Capacity.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: CUT K Rankine
web_applications.description: Rankine earth-pressure tool for direct evaluation of the active and passive coefficients as functions of soil friction angle and backfill angle, with integrated teaching notes on the limitations of the classical expressions for sloping backfill.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit
web_applications.description: Seismic earth-pressure analysis and comparison tool (EN 1998-5, prEN 1998-5, AASHTO, CUT) with layered soils, groundwater, surcharge, and pressure distributions.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

desktop_programs.title: CUT Bearing Capacity
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT Bearing Capacity program for local execution on Windows systems.
desktop_programs.note: Recommended for offline use and local distribution.

desktop_programs.title: CUT K Coulomb
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT K Coulomb program for local Windows use.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for local classroom, lab, or office installation.

desktop_programs.title: CUT K Rankine
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT K Rankine program for local Windows use.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for local classroom, lab, office, and offline use.

desktop_programs.title: CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit for local execution on Windows systems.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for local classroom, lab, office, and offline use.

documentation.title: CUT Bearing Capacity
documentation.description: User manual, supporting documentation, and references for the CUT Bearing Capacity program.

references.text: Pantelidis, L. (2026). Unified pseudo-static seismic reduction factors for shallow foundations via an earth-pressure framework. Soils and Foundations, 66(1), 101713. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.sandf.2025.101713

documentation.title: CUT K Coulomb
documentation.description: User manual and references for the CUT K Coulomb program.

references.text: Classical Coulomb earth-pressure theory and related developments in geotechnical engineering literature.

documentation.title: CUT K Rankine
documentation.description: User manual and references for the CUT K Rankine program.

references.text: Rankine, W. J. M. (1857). On the stability of loose earth. Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society of London, 147, 9–27.

Pantelidis, L. (2024). From EN 1998-5: 2004 to prEN 1998-5: 2023: Has the calculation of earth pressures improved or deteriorated? In Proceedings of the XVIII European Conference on Soil Mechanics and Geotechnical Engineering (ECSMGE 2024), Lisbon, Portugal, 26–30 August 2024 (pp. 733–738). CRC Press. https://doi.org/10.1201/9781003431749-121

documentation.title: CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit
documentation.description: User manual and references for the CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit.

references.text: EN 1998-5, prEN 1998-5, AASHTO seismic earth-pressure provisions and related literature.
